items.title_en: Luxury spending now driven by experiences and 'inheritourism'
items.title_zh: 奢侈品消费现在由体验和“遗产旅游”驱动
items.desc_en: While luxury goods sales are expected to grow between 1% and 4%, experiences are on track for growth of between 3% and 7% this year, according to a new report.
items.desc_zh: 一份新报告显示，虽然奢侈品销售额预计将增长 1% 至 4%，但体验今年的增长有望在 3% 至 7% 之间。

items.title_en: Strategy should halt bitcoin buys and bolster cash reserves, CryptoQuant says
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，策略应停止购买比特币并增加现金储备
items.desc_en: Michael Saylor's Strategy should pause its bitcoin purchases and rebuild its cash reserves, according to a CryptoQuant report.
items.desc_zh: 根据 CryptoQuant 的报告，Michael Saylor 的战略应该暂停比特币购买并重建现金储备。

items.title_zh: 最高法院允许特朗普取消对数千名海地和叙利亚移民的保护 - NBC新闻

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: Micron is soaring after blowout earnings report. That's good news for this other memory chipmaker, Citigroup says
items.title_zh: 美光科技在公布井喷的财报后股价飙升。花旗集团表示，这对另一家内存芯片制造商来说是个好消息
items.desc_en: Sandisk will likely benefit from the surge in memory demand that was behind Micron's extraordinary results reported Wednesday, according to Citi.
items.desc_zh: 据花旗银行称，Sandisk 可能会受益于内存需求的激增，这是美光周三公布的非凡业绩背后的原因。

items.title_en: Micron stock jumps 19% after blockbuster earnings, leading chip rally
items.title_zh: 美光科技股价大涨 19%，引领芯片股上涨
items.desc_en: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday
items.desc_zh: 据周三报道，该公司的收入从去年同期的 93 亿美元增长了四倍多，达到 414.6 亿美元

items.title_en: Bank of America says correction risks are rising, add protection into Q3
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示调整风险正在上升，第三季度增加保护
items.desc_en: Wall Street is riding high this quarter. Bank of America thinks there may be some turbulence once the third quarter begins.
items.desc_zh: 华尔街本季度表现强劲。美国银行认为，一旦第三季度开始，可能会出现一些动荡。

items.title_en: The world’s top-performing stock market still isn’t a developed market. Here’s why, according to the MSCI chief
items.title_zh: 全球表现最好的股票市场仍然不是发达市场。 MSCI 总裁表示，原因如下
items.desc_en: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.
items.desc_zh: MSCI首席执行官亨利·费尔南德斯表示，韩国股市仍低于发达市场标准。

items.title_en: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.title_zh: 在充满不确定性的时期，地震对委内瑞拉造成毁灭性打击
items.desc_en: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.
items.desc_zh: 这两次地震发生在委内瑞拉时任领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗被美军抓获后不到六个月。

items.title_en: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
items.title_zh: 南非警察腐败丑闻关键人物认罪
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，“猫”乌西穆西·马特拉拉可以提供针对“高级官员”的证据。

items.title_en: Apple raises prices on MacBook and iPad due to memory crunch, hints at more to come
items.title_zh: 由于内存短缺，苹果提高了 MacBook 和 iPad 的价格，并暗示还会有更多价格上涨
items.desc_en: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
items.desc_zh: 蒂姆·库克上周表示，由于内存和存储成本飙升，苹果将提高价格。

items.title_en: JPMorgan names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh co-presidents as longtime exec Marianne Lake exits
items.title_zh: 摩根大通任命 Doug Petno 和 Troy Rohrbaugh 为联席总裁，长期执行官 Marianne Lake 退出

items.title_en: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
items.title_zh: 美联储首选指标显示，5 月份核心通胀率达到 3.4%，为 2023 年 10 月以来最高
items.desc_en: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.
items.desc_zh: 个人消费支出价格指数预计同比增长4.1%。

items.title_en: Wendy's shares soar for a second day as retail investors pile into their new meme darling
items.title_zh: 随着散户投资者涌入他们的新宠儿，温迪股价连续第二天飙升
items.desc_en: The stock's advance appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social-media enthusiasm.
items.desc_zh: 该股的上涨似乎很大程度上与公司基本面无关，而是反映了社交媒体热情的爆发。

items.title_en: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.title_zh: 法国将健康警报提升至最高级别，欧洲热浪东移
items.desc_en: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.desc_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员表示，年轻人中出现了因高温而死亡的情况。

items.title_en: Ryanair says it will reluctantly let parents sit next to children for free
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空表示将不情愿地让父母免费坐在孩子旁边
items.desc_en: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司通常向成人收取单程 8 英镑的费用，以便与年幼的孩子坐在一起。

items.title_en: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay
items.title_zh: GameStop 的首席执行官刚刚牺牲了 350 亿美元的薪酬方案。以下是这对他收购 eBay 的努力有何影响
items.desc_en: Ryan Cohen has shared few details on how he'll move forward with his $56 billion offer for eBay since the company rejected the proposal in May.
items.desc_zh: 自 5 月份 eBay 拒绝该提议以来，瑞安·科恩 (Ryan Cohen) 并未透露有关如何推进 eBay 560 亿美元报价的细节。

items.title_en: Iraq piles pressure on OPEC over quota dispute after UAE exit
items.title_zh: 阿联酋退出后，伊拉克就配额争端向欧佩克施加压力
items.desc_en: Reuters reported that though Iraq had considered leaving OPEC, the ​current plan is to remain a member of the group while seeking a higher output quota.
items.desc_zh: 路透社报道称，尽管伊拉克曾考虑退出欧佩克，但目前的计划是保留该组织成员身份，同时寻求更高的产量配额。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube are reinventing sports viewership. Broadcasters are taking note
items.title_zh: TikTok 和 YouTube 正在重塑体育赛事收视率。广播公司正在注意
items.desc_en: Leagues, teams and media networks are increasingly meeting younger fans on social media as platforms like TikTok, Roblox and YouTube capture most of their time.
items.desc_zh: 随着 TikTok、Roblox 和 YouTube 等平台占据了年轻球迷的大部分时间，联盟、球队和媒体网络越来越多地在社交媒体上与年轻球迷见面。

items.title_en: Chevron CFO says gas prices will normalize after Trump presses Big Oil
items.title_zh: 雪佛龙首席财务官表示，特朗普向石油巨头施压后，天然气价格将正常化
items.desc_en: Her comments come shortly after President Donald Trump ordered an investigation into Big Oil, accusing them of "gouging" consumers.
items.desc_zh: 她发表此番言论之前不久，唐纳德·特朗普总统下令对大型石油公司进行调查，指责他们“欺骗”消费者。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_zh: 肯尼亚为 Z 世代抗议做好准备，警方封锁了内罗毕的主要道路
items.desc_en: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者要求为 2024 年示威活动和去年周年纪念抗议活动中丧生的 80 多人伸张正义。

items.desc_zh: 该公司声称阿里巴巴使用欺诈账户来访问其 Claude AI 模型的数据。

items.title_en: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.title_zh: 法国创下最热天气后空调引发政治分歧
items.desc_en: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.
items.desc_zh: 随着气温飙升，法国被迫重新考虑其长期以来对空调的保留态度。

items.title_en: Blop
items.title_zh: Blop
items.desc_en: Describe your app and Blop tests it and repairs broken tests
items.desc_zh: 描述您的应用程序，然后 Blop 对其进行测试并修复损坏的测试

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea
items.title_zh: 乌克兰空袭摧毁了俄罗斯占领的克里米亚主要城市的电力
items.desc_en: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.desc_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title_en: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼支持的候选人在纽约民主党初选中大获全胜
items.desc_en: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.
items.desc_zh: 布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 在一场竞选中击败丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman)，暴露了该市在以色列-加沙战争问题上的分歧。

items.desc_en: Turn followers into clients.
items.desc_zh: 将追随者变成客户。

items.title_en: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解
items.desc_en: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.
items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We're at one of Europe's biggest tech events.
items.desc_zh: 我们正在参加欧洲最大的科技活动之一。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: Postproxy - Engagement API
items.title_zh: Postproxy - Engagement API
items.desc_en: Publish, reply, and analyze social media via API
items.desc_zh: 通过 API 发布、回复和分析社交媒体

items.title_en: BrowserBash
items.title_zh: BrowserBash
items.desc_en: CLI that turns plain-English into real browser tests
items.desc_zh: CLI 将简单的英语变成真正的浏览器测试

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.title_en: Do you know your 'sweat score'? The rise of hydration tech
items.title_zh: 你知道你的“汗水分数”吗？补水技术的兴起
items.desc_en: Hydration tracking gadgets are flooding the market but is it too much information?
items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_en: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: It's not just about nudity warns actress - the complex reality of images and online abuse
items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实
items.desc_en: Tech companies and authorities are failing women by focusing on nudity rather than consent, says a report by Chayn.
items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。
